nasb.text: For perhaps he was for this reason separated from you for a while, that you would have him back forever,

esv.text: For this perhaps is why he was parted from you for a while, that you might have him back forever,

cnv.text: 也許他暫時離開你，正是為了使你永遠得著他，

ccb.text: 或许他暂时离开你是为了让你以后永远得到他。

csbs.text: 其实，他暂时离开你，或许正是为了使你可以永远得着他——
